revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[モジュール:Location map/data/Japan Yamaguchi Prefecture/doc]] to [[Module:Location map/data/Japan Yamaguchi Prefecture/doc]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{{subst:PAGENAME}}}" to "{{subst:PAGENAME}}"
Text replacement - "ew pages" to "ew automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:reimport"
Moving [[:Category:Japan prefecture location map templates]] to [[:Category:Japan prefecture location map modules]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Speedy]]
revision.text:
<!-- Place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page; interwikis at Wikidata --> {{Module:Location map/data/doc | see also = * [[Module:Location map/data/Japan]]
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Japan prefecture location map modules|Yamaguchi]] }}</includeonly>

<!-- Place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page; interwikis at Wikidata --> {{Module:Location map/data/doc | see also = * [[Module:Location map/data/Japan]]
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Japan prefecture location map modules|Yamaguchi]] }}</includeonly>
